strings.select_booking_prompt: Which booking would you like to manage? You can provide the booking reference or I can show you all your bookings.
strings.action_prompt: What would you like to do? (view details / change dates / change passengers / upgrade / cancel)
strings.change_details_prompt: What specific changes would you like to make?
strings.cancellation_reason_prompt: Could you share the reason for cancellation? This helps us improve our service.
strings.view_complete: Here are your booking details. Is there anything else you'd like to manage?
strings.modify_complete: Your booking has been updated successfully!
strings.24h_restriction: Changes cannot be made within 24 hours of departure. For emergency changes, I'll connect you with our support team.
strings.non_modifiable_fare: This is a non-modifiable fare and cannot be changed online. Let me connect you with our phone support team who may be able to help.
